title: Mcunningham
compiled_truth: Mcunningham is an external contact at [Isda](companies/isda). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-12-07), Mcunningham sent 11 and received 113 emails, totalling 124 interactions. Top correspondents: [Board](people/board-isda) (9), [Rpickel](people/rpickel-isda) (8), [Rainslie](people/rainslie-isda) (3), [Skawano](people/skawano-isda) (3), [Apapesch](people/apapesch-isda) (3).
